MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Terese Cronin's Motion to Be Relived From Order to Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Case is ordered scheduled for Jury Trial on 7/5/2011 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206.
